faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get your questions about OMNISEEN answered

howWorks.question: How does AI article generation work?
howWorks.answer: Our AI analyzes the topic, keywords and context of your business to generate complete articles, optimized for SEO, with professional structure, images and automatic FAQs.

plagiarism.question: Are the articles unique or could they be plagiarized?
plagiarism.answer: All articles are 100% original, generated specifically for you. We use advanced AI models that create unique content based on your blog's context and specifications.

customDomain.question: Can I use my own domain?
customDomain.answer: Yes! On Plus and Scale plans you can connect your custom domain with free SSL certificate and automatic DNS configuration.

trial.question: How does the free trial work?
trial.answer: You have 7 days to test all features of your chosen plan with no commitment. No credit card required to start.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription whenever you want, without fines or additional fees. Your access continues until the end of the paid period.

limit.question: What happens if I reach the article limit?
limit.answer: You can upgrade your plan at any time or wait for the monthly renewal. Draft articles don't count towards the limit.

support.question: How does support work?
support.answer: We offer email support on all plans, with response within 24 hours. Plus plans have priority support and Scale includes a dedicated account manager.

yearlyDiscount.question: Do you offer a discount for annual payment?
yearlyDiscount.answer: Yes! By choosing annual payment, you get 25% off, saving significantly on your subscription.

noBlog.question: Do I need a blog to use OMNISEEN?
noBlog.answer: No! OMNISEEN creates a professional blog for you automatically. You don't need any technical knowledge or existing website.

googlePenalty.question: Will Google penalize AI content?
googlePenalty.answer: No. Google's guidelines focus on content quality, not how it was created. Our AI generates high-quality, unique, and valuable content that ranks well.
